CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.item: Canonical launcher-managed runtime stack is clean with one launcher tree and one each of recommendation_api, bot_core, dashboard_server, and resolution_watcher.
CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.evidence: WMIC process snapshot showed launch_all.py parent chain 41368 -> 36780 with child PIDs 19664, 35328, 32244, 35584 and no duplicate service copies.

CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.item: Dashboard APIs are reachable and broadly coherent.
CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.evidence: /api/state, /api/trades, /api/games, and /api/mlb-shadow all returned successfully during audit.

CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.item: Open-position truth is aligned at zero open positions.
CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.evidence: /api/state bankroll.open_trade_count=0, /api/state open_positions empty, /api/trades returned no open rows in live DB helper, DB OPEN_ROWS=[], DB DUPES=[] .

CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.item: Duplicate-entry DB protection is still intact.
CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.evidence: Live DB index present: idx_trades_one_open_per_slug UNIQUE ON trades(market_slug) WHERE status='open'.

CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.item: Current bankroll arithmetic is internally consistent for the current zero-open state.
CURRENTLY_HEALTHY.evidence: /api/state bankroll current=136.0, net_pnl=-364.0, available_cash=136.0, capital_committed=0.0, open_trade_count=0.

CRITICAL_BUGS.item: Shared workflow memory is stale/incomplete relative to recent work.
CRITICAL_BUGS.evidence: BOT_BRIDGE\08_SHARED_CONTEXT files show last updates around 2026-04-05 21:23 and do not reflect newer Loveable-task confusion or this audit before update.
CRITICAL_BUGS.impact: Claude return/handoff quality is currently unreliable unless shared context is refreshed.

IMPORTANT_BUGS.item: Shadow/advisory layer is effectively stale right now.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.evidence: /api/mlb-shadow log_age_sec=46809.1 with recs=[] and unresolved count still 6871, indicating the shadow summary is historically accumulated and not currently useful as live diagnostics.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.impact: Dashboard diagnostics can look confusing or misleading because counts are historical while current rec list is empty.

IMPORTANT_BUGS.item: Dashboard/live monitor quality remains weak from a usability standpoint even if truth is mostly preserved.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.evidence: Current production and V2 were already rejected by user; code/brief review shows accounting/HUD strips and generic dashboard framing still overpower baseball-state density and live-monitor feel.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.impact: System is operationally usable but operator-facing monitoring remains misleading/underwhelming.

IMPORTANT_BUGS.item: Historical duplicate trade artifacts remain visible in closed trade history.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.evidence: /api/trades still shows ids 103 and 104 as identical closed SEA-LAA entries and id 102 as duplicate_remediation_void.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.impact: No current execution break, but audit/history readability remains messy and can confuse later analysis.

IMPORTANT_BUGS.item: Dashboard log shows recurring ESPN/network fetch failures over time.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.evidence: dashboard_err.log contains repeated getaddrinfo failures; dashboard.log also shows TLS/internal-error refresh failures.
IMPORTANT_BUGS.impact: Live games feed can degrade or go stale during network/DNS issues.

COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.item: Dashboard server logs contain noisy aborted-connection traces from client disconnects.
COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.evidence: dashboard.log shows ConnectionAbortedError stack trace in BaseHTTPRequestHandler write path.
COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.impact: Low severity, but noisy logs make real failures harder to spot.

COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.item: Pitcher names are often blank for scheduled games until detail fetch is available.
COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.evidence: /api/games scheduled entries currently return home_pitcher='' and away_pitcher=''.
COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.impact: Monitor richness degrades pregame or when ESPN detail fetch is unavailable.

COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.item: Loveable prep files were not present in shared context at audit time.
COSMETIC_OR_LATER_ISSUES.evidence: BOT_BRIDGE\08_SHARED_CONTEXT listing showed no LOVEABLE_* files.

LIKELY_ROOT_CAUSES: Dashboard UX problems come from repeated iterative layering on top of an originally admin/log-oriented structure rather than a clean baseball-monitor design foundation.
Shadow staleness/confusion comes from using a large cumulative jsonl log with historical counters rather than a clean current-session/live-window diagnostic summary.
Workflow hygiene drift comes from many rapid task pivots and incomplete shared-context backfill after those pivots.
Network-related live game fragility comes from reliance on ESPN fetches without resilient cached/health-state surfacing.
WHAT_SHOULD_BE_FIXED_FIRST: Fix/clarify the shadow diagnostics layer so current live diagnostic truth is not represented by stale historical counters.
Refresh BOT_BRIDGE shared-context/catch-up files so handoff state matches actual current work and audit findings.
After docs are clean, redesign the operator-facing dashboard from a baseball-monitor-first brief instead of further patching the current UI.
WHAT_MUST_NOT_REGRESS: Unique open-slug DB protection index must remain present.
Canonical single launcher tree must remain free of duplicate writer/service stacks.
Main live positions must continue to come from real paper trades only.
Available cash / committed capital / live equity arithmetic must remain truthful.
Trade log must not retake ownership of the page once UI work resumes.
